title: Netherenditions
description: This Mod Adds New Biomes to The Nether and End!
body:
![Netherenditions Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fe880d76c8456d63f433a738eeb304e7847af24.png)
# THIS MOD IS CURRENTLY GETTING REWROTE!

### This Mod Adds New Biomes to The Nether And End!

## Features

**Nether And End Biomes**
This mod Expands The Nether Update With More biomes to the nether than the previous 4 added in 1.16, And Also Adding End Biomes (Yes, now a remerge is happening)

<details>
<summary>Biomes List</summary>

1. **Burned Forest**\
A Forest That Was Once Burned Mysteriously......

2. **Therian Heights**\
A forest that has been long Evolved from a single Shroom

3. **Blackstone Wastes**\
A Destroyed Variant of the Basalt Deltas
</details>

**New Ores**
This mod isn't just about adding new Nether and End biomes, It Also Adds New Ores and Materials for You to find in them!

**Biome Additions**
This Mod Improves All Existing vanilla Nether And End biomes, and Adds More [Biome Features](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Feature/ "Wiki") to the existing Biomes.

**Mod Integrations**
This Mod Will Be integrated with [FallingTrees](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-tree/ "FT") And [REI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roughly-enough-items/ "REI"), Just like [UDP](https://modrinth.com/mod/udp)


The Things mentioned here is going to be added throughout the Updates, Some Are Going to change in the future and some Are going to be probably removed only temporarily or permanently

## Important Info

**I Am not going to Maintain the forge version, Fabric & Quilt** 

This Mod is maintained only for 1.18 and up and no Backporting To An Older version

> **Supported Versions** Not Backporting Below 1.18
> ### Fabric & Quilt 
> * 1.20.x (1.20-1.20.4)

**THIS MOD BREAKS WITH OPTIFABRIC ON Below 1.6.1 AND Above 1.6.5**

**REUPLOADING THIS MOD IS FORBIDDEN!!** 

## Project Members & Mod Incompatibilities + Dependencies 

- ErzeKawek (Lead Dev/Owner)

### Mod Incompatibilities

- OptiFabric (Will Overload Your GPU If Used)

### Dependencies

### Fabric
- [BCLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/bclib) **Fabric & Quilt**
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) **Fabric**
- [QSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) **Quilt**
